split.criterion: random 15% of 1341 inscriptions held out (rng seed+2)

ranked_alternatives: held-out A-rate within 2se band AND A-enriched (PRIMARY)
A-rate within band but enrichment not significant (power-limited, still PASS on point)
structural_predictions.failure_criterion: held-out word-initial-A rate outside the 2se band OR held-out A-count <= frequency-null mean (wrong direction) OR ledger CARRIER->NUM well-formed rate drops below 0.70.
structural_predictions.scoring_rule: PASS if (a) held-out rate_A in band, (b) held-out A obs > null_mean, (c) held-out ledger well-formed >=0.70. Report |rate_A_holdout - point|.
